subject: FW: To Jeffrey re: Tomorrow, Sat. 11/17
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Tramo, Mark Jude [mailto:mark_tramo@hms.harvard.edu] 
Sent: Friday, November 16, 2007 2:57 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: To Jeffrey re: Tomorrow, Sat. 11/17



Jeffrey - Looking forward to seeing you...Spoke to Helen...

* I have us meeting at 1 Brattle Sq, 6th floor at 10:30 AM tomorrow
Saturday 11/17-

FYI - I had lunch w/ Martin there about 2-3 mos ago re: his musicophilia
and my take on how we could use neurobiological techniques (e.g., ERPs,
single-neuron recordings in auditory cortex) to empirically test
mathematically-based hypotheses about music evolution in the Western
idiom...

* If you'd like to see the Newborn Intensive Care Unit - or the
microelectrode laboratory -

they're at Mass General, across the street from my Beacon Hill/Institute
office, about 20 mins straight down Cambridge St across the Longfellow
Bridge into Boston.  That's the office address I gave Helen: 175
Cambridge St, 3rd floor, Suite 340.

* I'll bring the information you requested re: Institute strategic plan
etc -

Cheers,
Mark

mtramo@hms.harvard.edu

Cell = 781-718-6390

Page via hospital operator for callback = 617-726-2066
body_html:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

From: Tramo, Mark Jude [mailto:mark_tramo@hms.harvard.edu]
Sent: Friday, November 16, 2007 2:57 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: To Jeffrey re: Tomorrow, Sat. 11/17

Jeffrey - Looking forward to seeing you...Spoke to Helen...

• I have us meeting at 1 Brattle Sq, 6th floor at 10:30 AM tomorrow Saturday 11/17-

FYI - I had lunch w/ Martin there about 2-3 mos ago re: his musicophilia and my take on how we could use neurobiological techniques (e.g., ERPs, single-neuron recordings in auditory cortex) to empirically test mathematically-based hypotheses about music evolution in the Western idiom...

• If you'd like to see the Newborn Intensive Care Unit - or the microelectrode laboratory -

they're at Mass General, across the street from my Beacon Hill/Institute office, about 20 mins straight down Cambridge St across the Longfellow Bridge into Boston.  That's the office address I gave Helen: 175 Cambridge St, 3rd floor, Suite 340.

• I'll bring the information you requested re: Institute strategic plan etc -

Cheers,
Mark

mtramo@hms.harvard.edu
